title: 022b 21st Century China 4539 feb07
description:
Deal with China on all fronts, for China is not a monolith.
As it changes, so the voices and interests
that make up the country multiply.
We would do well to engage them all.

camera 1 on site: Da Vaz
camera 2 on site: Shi Qi
support on site: Jin Can, Lin Ying, Han Yin, Li Ai Bin,
Xu Zhong Bo, Fu, Zhou Xiang Fei, Kong Yue Hua
editing: Sándor Gréczi
directed by Jürg Da Vaz
filmed on site in Shanghai and Hangzhou, China
